debug_info.goal:
L : Logic ℕ
χ ξ : Formula ℕ
T : LO.Propositional.FTheory L
hT : χ ➝ ξ ∉ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
inst✝ : Entailment.F L
⊢ ∀ (φ ψ : Formula ℕ),
    φ ➝ ψ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T →
      φ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction_omega L χ ξ T hT →
        ψ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction_omega L χ ξ T hT

failed_attempts: intro U φ ψ h_imp h_phi

intro U φ ψ h_imp h_phi
  by_contra h_psi
  obtain ⟨Γ, hΓ_sub, hΓ_imp⟩ := (of_not_mem_construction_omega h_psi).2
  let Σ := insert φ Γ
  have hΣ_sub : ↑Σ ⊆ U := by
    intro x hx

intro φ ψ hImp hφ
  by_contra hψ
  obtain ⟨_, ⟨Γ, hΓ, hΓξ⟩⟩ := of_not_mem_construction_omega hψ
  let Δ := insert φ Γ
  have hΔ : ↑Δ ⊆ U := by
    intro χ hχ
intro U φ ψ h_imp h_phi
intro U φ ψ h_imp h_phi

intro U φ ψ hTφψ hφ
  by_contra hψU
  obtain ⟨_, ⟨Γ, hΓ_sub, hΓ_imp⟩⟩ := of_not_mem_construction_omega hψU
  let S := insert φ Γ
  have hS_sub : ↑S ⊆ U := by
    intro x hx

rintro φ ψ hφψ hφ
  by_contra hψ
  obtain ⟨Γ, hΓ, hΓξ⟩ := of_not_mem_construction_omega hψ
  obtain ⟨i, hi⟩ := by simpa [construction_omega] using hφ
  let k := max i (encode ψ)
  have hΓk : ↑Γ ⊆ construction T hT k := subset_trans hΓ (monotone_construction (le_max_right _ _))
  have hφk : φ ∈ construction T hT k := monotone_construction (le_max_left _ _) hi
  let Θ := insert φ Γ
  have hΘk : ↑Θ ⊆ construction T hT k := by
    intro x

intro φ ψ himp hphi
  have : φ ➝ ψ ∈ U := by
    apply mem_omega_of_mem
    apply T.imp_closed _ himp
    grind
  have : (φ ➝ ψ) ⋏ φ ∈ U := construction_omega_andClosed this hphi
  apply construction_omega_impClosed _ this
  grind
intro U φ ψ h_imp h_phi
intro U φ ψ hφψ hφ
rintro U φ ψ h hφ
